summary: Added the missing supported static Codex OAuth Omnigent host contract. The broader production lifecycle remains incomplete after the final bounded remediation attempt.

gapStatuses.evidence: No attempt-6 change; direct, Omnigent, and OAuth maintenance consumers are not yet wired through one ProviderProfileManager lease.

gapStatuses.requirement: Profile-bound host materialization and destination preflight
gapStatuses.evidence: docker-compose.codex-host.yaml adds a fixed-UID/GID static host with separate state, CODEX_HOME, codex_auth_volume, sanitized workspace, and cleared competing credentials; exact-host login-status/generation preflight and on-demand launch remain unresolved.
No attempt-6 change; executionProfileRef is not yet resolved to the persisted exact-host binding under an active provider lease.

gapStatuses.requirement: Generation lifecycle, cleanup, reconciliation, diagnostics, and checkpoints
gapStatuses.evidence: No attempt-6 change; generation drain, release-last cleanup, stale-state reconciliation, lifecycle projection, and checkpoint recovery remain absent.

Added a hermetic compose-contract test for the Codex host. Pytest is unavailable in this runtime, so it could not execute; compilation and diff hygiene passed. Broader workflow/integration coverage remains unresolved.

knownRemainingGaps: Shared lease use across direct, Omnigent, reconnect, disconnect, and credential-mutating maintenance operations
Exact-host authentication and credential-generation preflight plus on-demand host launch
Profile-aware exact-host routing, bridge authorization, and retry-safe first-message persistence
